message:
fix: agent selector and profile button heights to match h-9 navbar (#7648)

AgentSelector trigger used min-h-[44px] and UserProfileDropdown used
p-2 with w-8 h-8 avatar (48px effective). Both now match h-9 (36px)
like all other navbar buttons.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
